title: elymus caianus
intro: Elymus caianus, also known as Caia grass, is a species of wild grass native to China and other parts of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, providing various health benefits to those who consume it. Elymus caianus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, allowing for versatile uses in traditional medicine and modern herbal supplements.
